mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT uid) FROM eb_merchant_member emm LEFT JOIN eb_user eu ON emm.uid = eu.id WHERE emm.mer_id = #{merId} AND emm.is_logoff = 0 AND eu.is_logoff = 0

SELECT ANY_VALUE(u.register_type) as register_type, COUNT(mm.id) AS num FROM `eb_merchant_member` mm LEFT JOIN eb_user u on u.id = mm.uid WHERE mm.mer_id = #{merId} AND mm.is_logoff = 0 GROUP BY u.register_type
